SOLANA_RPC_URL.description: Solana RPC endpoint URL used to create a connection for managing positions.

TEE_MODE.description: Determines whether Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) mode is enabled or off. Used to decide how the wallet keypair is loaded or derived.

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.description: Salt used to deterministically derive an Ed25519 keypair when TEE mode is enabled.

SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Base58 or base64 encoded Solana wallet private key, used to create a Keypair when TEE mode is OFF and a private key is required.

WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Fallback environment variable for the base58/base64 encoded Solana wallet private key when TEE mode is OFF.

SOLANA_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Public key of the Solana wallet, used when TEE mode is OFF and only the public key is required.

WALLET_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Fallback environment variable for the Solana wallet public key when TEE mode is OFF and only the public key is required.
